title: update

goal.text: Refresh the published claw-kit CLI and official Codex plugin installation.

requirements.summary: Refresh the global CLI first, refresh Codex from the official GitHub marketplace second, then verify both installed surfaces and report exact status.
acceptanceCriteria: The published global `@veewo/claw` CLI and official Codex plugin are both refreshed.
Codex uses the `chanyuenpang/claw-kit` repository marketplace and only `claw-kit@claw-kit` remains enabled.
CLI, marketplace source, enabled identity, source manifest, and cache manifest are verified against the target version.
The result reports exact success or failure for each surface.

tasks.title: Confirm the published target version and official Codex source
tasks.detail: Tell the user a newer claw-kit version was detected. Confirm the target version is published and available from the official package and `chanyuenpang/claw-kit` GitHub marketplace before changing local installs. A release workflow must publish and verify first.

tasks.title: Refresh the CLI and official Codex plugin
tasks.detail: Refresh the global CLI first. Inside this repository use `npm run install:local-cli`, then `npm run install:codex-plugin`; the Codex installer reads the published GitHub `main` marketplace snapshot. On another Codex machine, add `chanyuenpang/claw-kit --ref main` for first setup or upgrade the `claw-kit` marketplace, then install or enable `claw-kit@claw-kit`. Disable `claw-kit@claw-kit-local`. Do not install from unpublished workspace files or a local marketplace.

default.summary: The CLI and Codex plugin refresh commands completed; verify both installed surfaces.
nextsteps: Verify the official Codex marketplace source, enabled identity, and matching manifests.

tasks.title: Verify the CLI and Codex plugin
tasks.detail: Run `claw --version` and `npm list -g @veewo/claw --depth=0`. Verify `claw-kit@claw-kit` is enabled, `claw-kit@claw-kit-local` is disabled, and the official marketplace source manifest plus matching cache manifest equal the published target version. Confirm the active cache contains planning, config, update, create-claw-skill, and knowledge-writer, with retired truth-writer and adr-writer absent. Restart Codex and start a new task before validating the loaded skill version. Report exact success or failure for both surfaces.

references.why: Maps Codex update requirements to this skill package.

rules: Do not route or ask about another host; this is the Codex update workflow.
Publish and verify the target version before release-time installation refresh.
Use only the official GitHub marketplace and claw-kit@claw-kit identity.
Do not claim success unless both CLI and Codex plugin verification pass.
